LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.label: Brahmin
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.description: Brahmin serve a vital environmental niche in the wasteland, they form the foundation of survival for many species. Forming the backbone of the New Californian economy; brahmin can carry large loads for a far greater distance than other creatures. Brahmin droppings are great fertilizer and fuel for campfires; the fumes from their feces are also used to synthesize jet; while their hide and hair can be used to make tents, leather clothing, saddle bags, or a bizarre brahmin-looking disguise.
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.1.label: headbutt
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.2.label: left hoof
LanguageData.FCP_Animal_Brahmin.tools.3.label: right hoof
